line_description: Slanted parallelogram divided by diagonal lines into three sections, each containing a number (18, 17, 631). Dashed vertical lines on the right side suggest column boundaries.

graphics.description: Large slanted parallelogram (leaning right) spanning the full width of the line, divided internally by two diagonal lines into three sub-parallelogram cells
First internal diagonal line separating the '18' cell from the '17' cell
Second internal diagonal line separating the '17' cell from the '631' cell
Dashed vertical line on the right side, likely a column/row boundary marker
Dashed vertical line on the far right edge, likely a column/row boundary marker
